array.string: LOCKFILE="/tmp/lock_attribution_to_parquet.lock"; if [ -e "${LOCKFILE}" ] && kill -0 "$(cat "${LOCKFILE}")" 2>/dev/null; then pid="$(cat "${LOCKFILE}")"; echo "already running (PID: ${pid})"; exit 0; fi; trap "rm -f ${LOCKFILE}" INT TERM EXIT; echo $$ > ${LOCKFILE}; source /Users/zihao_/Documents/coding/dataset/venv/bin/activate; cd /Users/zihao_/Documents/coding/dataset; if command -v caffeinate >/dev/null 2>&1; then caffeinate -dimsu -w $$ & fi; export PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1; python -u scripts/lock_attribution_data_to_parquet.py
